name: Swing365 Lawrence
about: Swing365 Lawrence is a membership-based golf simulator venue offering access to private, state-of-the-art facilities. The venue provides a warm and inviting private club atmosphere with 365/24/7 tee times available for booking in individual suites. Golfers can enjoy a round on over 95 virtual courses, including Pebble Beach, or practice for tournaments with the latest simulator technology. The experience is designed for those who want to play golf on their own terms, with the flexibility of when and how they want to play.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Full Swing Pro Series simulators with infrared tracking for highly accurate ball flight data
Private booking environment for a focused, uninterrupted golf experience
Flexibility to play 95+ courses from around the world, including famous ones like Pebble Beach
Membership-based model with 24/7 access ensures availability for all members
Option to bring your own food and beverages for a personalized experience

food_and_drink.notes: Guests are permitted to bring their own food.
Guests are permitted to bring their own beverages (BYOB).

simulator_hardware.notes: Features infrared technology with 688 sensors across two tracks for high-speed ball tracking.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The provided content does not specify whether clubs are provided, so you should assume you need to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, guests are permitted to bring their own food and beverages (BYOB).

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content does not specify the duration for 18 holes, but it mentions sessions are typically 60-120 minutes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no information provided regarding kid-friendliness in the source material.
